title: Our Future with Robots
passage:
Our Future with Robots

Robots are everywhere today. They help us at home, in schools, and in hospitals. They are smart machines that can do many difficult things for people. Today, robots are becoming very popular all over the world.

At home, many people use a small robot to clean the floor. This robot is round and moves around the rooms. It sweeps the dust and dirt. It can clean when you are sleeping or when you are at work. Another smart machine is the smart speaker. You can speak to this speaker. It can play your favorite music, tell you the weather, or turn off the lights. It uses Artificial Intelligence, or AI, to understand your voice and talk to you.

In some schools, teachers use small robots to help students. These robots can teach languages like English, tell interesting stories, and play educational games. Children like learning with robots because they are very fun. Some robots also work in hospitals. They carry medicine and food to sick patients. This helps doctors and nurses have more time to do other important work. It also keeps hospitals clean and safe.

In factories, big robots do heavy work. They can lift heavy boxes and build cars. They work very fast and do not get tired. They can work all day and all night without sleeping. This helps companies make things quickly and cheaply.

In the future, we will see many more robots. Some robots will drive cars and buses. Other robots will help old people in their homes. They will help old people cook food and clean their rooms. Robots make our lives easier and safer, but they cannot do everything. They still need humans to program them and fix them when they break.

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: What does the home robot clean?
questions.explanation: Paragraph 2 states: 'At home, many people use a small robot to clean the floor.'

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: What does a smart speaker use to understand your voice?
questions.explanation: Paragraph 2 states: 'It uses Artificial Intelligence, or AI, to understand your voice and talk to you.'

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: Why do children like learning with robots?
questions.explanation: Paragraph 3 states: 'Children like learning with robots because they are very fun.'

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: Why do big robots in factories not get tired?
questions.explanation: Paragraph 4 states: 'They work very fast and do not get tired. They can work all day and all night without sleeping.'

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE, FALSE, or NOT GIVEN.
questions.text: Smart speakers can turn off the lights.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 2 states that the smart speaker can 'turn off the lights'.

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE, FALSE, or NOT GIVEN.
questions.text: Robots in hospitals give medicine to doctors.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 3 states: 'They carry medicine and food to sick patients.' They give medicine to patients, not doctors.

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE, FALSE, or NOT GIVEN.
questions.text: Robots in factories are very small.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 4 states: 'In factories, big robots do heavy work.' They are big, not very small.

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE, FALSE, or NOT GIVEN.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 5 mentions that 'Some robots will drive cars and buses', but it does not mention trains.

questions.instruction: Complete the sentences below. Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.text: Robots in hospitals carry medicine and ______ to sick patients.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 3 states: 'They carry medicine and food to sick patients.'

questions.instruction: Complete the sentences below. Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.text: Big robots in factories can lift heavy boxes and build ______.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 4 states: 'They can lift heavy boxes and build cars.'

questions.instruction: Complete the sentences below. Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.text: Robots still need ______ to program them and fix them.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 5 states: 'They still need humans to program them and fix them when they break.'

vocabulary.meaning: liked by many people (phổ biến, được yêu thích)
cleans the floor using a brush or machine (quét dọn)
a sick person receiving medical treatment in a hospital (bệnh nhân)
a building where things are made by machines (nhà máy)
to give a set of instructions to a computer or robot (lập trình)

tactics:
Hướng dẫn làm bài (A1-A2)

1. Định vị từ khóa (Scanning): Tìm các từ khóa nổi bật trong câu hỏi như 'clean', 'smart speaker', 'hospital', 'factories' trong bài đọc. Ở trình độ A1-A2, các từ này xuất hiện y hệt trong bài đọc.

2. Kỹ thuật trả lời câu hỏi True/False/Not Given:
- Nếu thông tin trong câu hỏi giống hệt trong bài: chọn TRUE.
- Nếu thông tin trong câu hỏi trái ngược trực tiếp (ví dụ: bài viết 'big robots', câu hỏi viết 'small'): chọn FALSE.
- Nếu thông tin không được nhắc tới (ví dụ: 'trains'): chọn NOT GIVEN.

3. Điền từ vào chỗ trống: Chú ý giới hạn từ (NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS). Tìm câu chứa từ khóa xung quanh chỗ trống và chép đúng từ trong bài ra, không tự ý thay đổi dạng từ.
